entity.label: Bamah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A height, a name used simply to denote a high place where the Jews worshipped idols (Ezek. 20:29). The plural is translated “high places” in Num. 22:41 and Ezek. 36:2.

nodes.label: Bamah
nodes.description: A height, a name used simply to denote a high place where the Jews worshipped idols (Ezek. 20:29). The plural is translated “high places” in Num. 22:41 and Ezek. 36:2.

verses.text: Then I said unto them, What is the high place whereunto ye go? And the name thereof is called Bamah unto this day.
